description_long: This is a large, upright outdoor trash bin with a rectangular, slightly tapered body made of green plastic. The bin features a flat, black lid that covers the entire top surface, providing protection from rain and pests. Two sturdy black wheels are attached at the base on one side, allowing for easy mobility when tilted and pulled. On one side of the bin, a white recycling symbol is clearly visible, indicating its intended use for recyclable materials. The surface of the bin is mostly smooth with some subtle textural variations and signs of wear near the bottom. There are no visible handles, but the lid appears to be removable or liftable by hand.
description: A large green plastic trash bin with a flat black lid, two wheels, and a visible recycling symbol on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain green face of the bin, the flat black lid, and both wheels visible at the base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the recycling symbol, one wheel, and the sloped profile of the lid.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the flat, solid black lid and the rectangular opening beneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain green surface and one wheel, with no visible signage.
